description_long: This object is a modern military jet fighter with a sleek, angular fuselage and a sharply pointed nose. The wings are swept back with a slight anhedral angle, and each wing features a red star insignia near the tips. The aircraft has twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, canted outward, and three prominent engine exhaust nozzles at the back. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark canopy. The overall surface is smooth and painted in a light gray camouflage pattern, with some darker accents on the engines and tail.
description: A modern, angular military jet fighter with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the angular, swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low, sleek profile, swept wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three engine exhaust nozzles, twin canted stabilizers, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angular fuselage, wing insignia, and the configuration of the tail and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Triple jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied but not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy.
